steps.title: Convert percentage decrease to multiplier and identify time period
steps.content: A $3.5\%$ decrease per year means the population is multiplied by $1-0.035=0.965$ each year. Use Desmos with $x_1=[0,1]$, $y_1=[6.32,6.32(0.965)]$, and $y_1\sim a b^{x_1}$.

steps.title: Apply the exponential decay formula
steps.content: Desmos gives $a=6.32$ and $b=0.965$. From 2005 to 2015 is $10$ years, so the expression is $6.32(0.965)^{10}$. That matches choice D.
